description: 'Describe what this custom agent does and when to use it.'
tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'edit', 'search', 'web', 'atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server/search', 'github/*', 'agent', 'todo']
---
when I use this mode make sure you are generating playwright test scripts in typescript for e2e testing based on the provided test scenarios. First, analyze the test scenarios and create a detailed plan outlining the necessary steps to implement the tests. Then, generate a todo list of tasks required to complete the test scripts. After that, proceed to write the actual Playwright test scripts in TypeScript, ensuring they align with the specified scenarios and follow best practices for e2e testing.
